providers.title: AWS Cross-Account Snapshot Connector
providers.summary: CloudFormation StackSet contract for a read-only plus snapshot-limited IAM role that Cerebro can assume into workload accounts.

artifacts.summary: StackSet-ready template, example parameters, and rollout notes for the CerebroScanRole deployment.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DescribeInstances
required_permissions.summary: Read instance attachment context before staging snapshot-backed inspection.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DescribeVolumes
required_permissions.summary: Read source EBS volumes for snapshot eligibility and attachment mapping.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DescribeSnapshots
required_permissions.summary: Read Cerebro-managed snapshots during validation and cleanup.

required_permissions.name: ec2:CreateSnapshot
required_permissions.summary: Create inspection snapshots from source volumes.
conditions: Require request tag marking Cerebro-managed snapshot operations.

required_permissions.name: ec2:CopySnapshot
required_permissions.summary: Copy snapshots into inspection or regional isolation flows.
conditions: Restrict copy operations to tagged Cerebro-managed snapshots.

required_permissions.name: ec2:ModifySnapshotAttribute
required_permissions.summary: Share Cerebro-managed snapshots with the inspection account when required.
conditions: Restrict mutable operations to tagged Cerebro-managed snapshots.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DeleteSnapshot
required_permissions.summary: Clean up Cerebro-managed snapshots after inspection.
conditions: Restrict deletion to tagged Cerebro-managed snapshots.

required_permissions.name: ec2:CreateVolume
required_permissions.summary: Materialize temporary inspection volumes from snapshots.
conditions: Require request tag marking Cerebro-managed temporary volumes.

required_permissions.name: ec2:AttachVolume
required_permissions.summary: Attach temporary inspection volumes when a scanner runtime is introduced.
conditions: Restrict attachments to tagged Cerebro-managed volumes.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DetachVolume
required_permissions.summary: Detach temporary inspection volumes during teardown.
conditions: Restrict detaches to tagged Cerebro-managed volumes.

required_permissions.name: ec2:DeleteVolume
required_permissions.summary: Delete temporary inspection volumes after use.
conditions: Restrict deletion to tagged Cerebro-managed volumes.

required_permissions.name: kms:Decrypt
required_permissions.summary: Use customer-managed keys when encrypted EBS volumes are snapshotted.
conditions: Limit use to EC2 via-service requests and AWS-resource grants.

required_permissions.name: kms:CreateGrant
required_permissions.summary: Delegate one-time EC2 snapshot access for encrypted volumes.
conditions: Require kms:GrantIsForAWSResource=true and EC2 via-service usage.

required_permissions.name: kms:ReEncryptFrom
required_permissions.summary: Support encrypted snapshot copy workflows.
conditions: Limit use to EC2 snapshot copy flows.

required_permissions.name: kms:ReEncryptTo
required_permissions.summary: Support encrypted snapshot copy workflows.
conditions: Limit use to EC2 snapshot copy flows.

validation_checks.summary: Resolve and prove the current AWS auth chain via STS caller identity.
Confirm read-only EC2 describe permissions required for workload targeting.
Optionally dry-run snapshot and volume mutation permissions with caller-supplied sample resources.

providers.title: Azure Snapshot Connector
providers.summary: Azure ARM and Terraform contracts for assigning Reader plus snapshot mutation rights to a Cerebro service principal or existing principal.

artifacts.summary: ARM template for assigning Reader and a snapshot-writer custom role to an existing principal.
Terraform module for creating a service principal and assigning Reader plus snapshot permissions.

required_permissions.name: Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups/read
required_permissions.summary: Reader baseline for discovering workload resource groups and compute assets.

required_permissions.name: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/read
required_permissions.summary: Read VM metadata before snapshot staging.

required_permissions.name: Microsoft.Compute/disks/read
required_permissions.summary: Read managed disk metadata for snapshot targeting.

required_permissions.name: Microsoft.Compute/snapshots/write
required_permissions.summary: Create temporary snapshots for inspection.

required_permissions.name: Microsoft.Compute/snapshots/delete
required_permissions.summary: Delete temporary snapshots after inspection.

validation_checks.summary: Resolve Azure credential chain and acquire a management-plane token.
Confirm the target subscription is readable with the current principal.
Inspect effective subscription-scope permission actions and verify Reader plus snapshot writes/deletes are present.

providers.title: GCP Snapshot Connector
providers.summary: Terraform module that provisions a custom role, service account, and optional Workload Identity Federation path for agentless workload snapshot access.

artifacts.summary: Terraform module for service-account provisioning plus optional Workload Identity Federation trust.

required_permissions.name: compute.disks.createSnapshot
required_permissions.summary: Create snapshots from source persistent disks.

required_permissions.name: compute.snapshots.get
required_permissions.summary: Read created snapshots for downstream inspection and cleanup.

required_permissions.name: compute.snapshots.delete
required_permissions.summary: Delete temporary inspection snapshots after use.

required_permissions.name: compute.snapshots.setIamPolicy
required_permissions.summary: Share snapshot access when an external inspection project is used.

required_permissions.name: compute.instances.get
required_permissions.summary: Read workload instance metadata for snapshot targeting.

validation_checks.summary: Resolve ADC, credentials-file, impersonation, or WIF auth and retrieve an access token.
Confirm project-scope control-plane access for the target connector project.
Use Cloud Resource Manager testIamPermissions to verify the snapshot permission set without creating resources.
